title: Multi-impact monolithic ballistic armour plate
abstract: A multi-layered, multi-impact resistant body armour (200) is provided. The armour includes an outer fabric (202); a wrapping fabric (204); a jointless armour-sized monolith ceramic plate (100); a backing plate (206); and an interface bonding layer (208) between the ceramic plate (100) and the backing plate (206) such that the ceramic plate (100) is a monolith ceramic plate adhered to a backing plate (206), and the wrapping fabric (204) wraps the ceramic plate (100) and the backing plate (206) and the outer fabric (202) covers the wrapping fabric (204).
claims: Claims aim: 1. A multi-impact monolithic ballistic armour plate (200) (200) comprises: a wrapping fabric (204); a jointless armour-sized monolith ceramic plate (100); a backing plate (206); and an interface bonding layer (208) between the ceramic plate (100) and the backing plate (206) characterised in that the ceramic plate (100) is a monolithic ceramic plate adhered to a backing plate (206), wherein the wrapping fabric (204) wraps the ceramic plate (100). 2. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1, and wherein the wrapping fabric (204) wraps the ceramic plate (100) and the backing plate (206). 3. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1, further comprises an outer fabric (202) that covers or wraps around the wrapping fabric (204). 4. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the outer fabric (202) is a polyester/Cotton/Nylon/any other covering material. 5. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the wrapping fabric is made of synthetic fibre. 6. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the backing plate (206) is made of fabric of polyethylene fibre or aramid fibre or glass fibre or carbon fibre or mixtures/combinations thereof or mixtures of layers of these. 7. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the synthetic fibre is para-aramid synthetic fibre. 8. The ballistic armour plate (200) as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the body armour (200) is resistant to 7.62 x 39 hard steel core bullets, 7.62 x 39 API, 5.56 x 45, 7.62 x 63 AP, 7.62 x 54 API, and other projectiles classified under level 4 or above. 9. The body armour (200) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the body armour is a body vest. 10. The body armour (200) as claimed in claim 1, wherein the body armour is worn around torso. 11. The body armour (200) as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the body armour is resistant to AP/API bullets.
